titleStmt.title: SII 17.45: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 45. (A.R. No. 43 of 1904). KUḌATINI, BELLARY TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up near the platform in front of the Kumārasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śaka 1132 Pramōda, Jyēshṭha, śu. 3, Thursday regularly corresponding to 1210 A.D., May 27, the month being Nija-Jyēshṭha.

It records gift of lands, house-sites and an oil mill for a perpetual lamp to the god Nāgēśvara by Vinayanidhi Vishṇukaradēva and the five Vargas and others who had formed an assembly. Among others Sunkaveṅgaḍe Nāgarasa is mentioned as one of the donors.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.head: Text.
div.p:
śrī gārī kucayugma cāruchara sa
ṇa vyālipta vakṣasthalī bhōgaṁ dēvanadīpayaḥ kaṇalasacchēṣākṣatālaṁkṛtaṁ nāgēṁdrōttama kuṁḍa
lāṁgada kaṭēsūtrōpavītāṁkitaṁ nāgēśaṁ padedīge koṭṭi toṇiyayduṁ varggadiṭṭārtthamaṁ . śivabhaktaṁ
gatibhaktanappa manujaṁgatyaṁta sadbhaktanappavanaṁ kāṇaloḍaṁ viriṁci harimukhyarkāṇa reṁbīśa
niṁduvalaṁ baṁdananutte kaimugiva nissaṁdēhadiṁ naṁbu vutsa�diṁ pūjisa bhaktakōṭe gabhavaṁ mā
ḷkiṣṭa saṁsiddhiyaṁ . śivaniṁdaṁ peṟatoṁdu daivamadhikaṁ tānuṁṭe sarvvēśanaṁ bhavanaṁ pūjisi kai
gaḷaṁ mugidu muktiśrīge pakkāgadēke vṛthākeṭṭapirēke cōra narakaṁbōkappiōkaṁte māna
varē poykana sāṟuguṁ ḍamaruga dhvānaṁ bhavāgāradoḷ . bhagapūṣarddha kṣayagñāva sarado
ḷabhavaṁ yagña bhāgārhanalleṁda gajēśāvagñegeyde vaḍadaraṟiyira rudranaṁbaṁdu kāṇiṁ ja
gamellaṁ bhaktiyiṁ kaimugiyimeṟagi mārādhisiṁ vīrabhadrādigaḷiṁ soppāgavēḍeṁ dulivu
dabhava gaṁbhīra bhērīninādaṁ . krūraviṣaṁgaḷaṁ kuḍivaraṁtakanaṁ jaṟivarmmahōgra kāḷōra ganaṁ kaḍaṁgi
piḍivarssiḍilaṁ poḍeva rggajāriyaṁ yārige tappariḷdu śivadūṣakanaṁjavanokki likkuva rvvī
ragaṇaṁgaḷeṁdoḍidirārpramathargge jagatrayaṁgaḷoḷ . karakamaḷaṁgaḷaṁ muṟidumāpatigē
ṟisi mīṁṭi kaṁṇgaḷaṁ harana śi�grado ḷiṟisi dāṁḍegaruḷgaḷoḷateyaṁ bhayaṁkara menemāḍi śaṁkara
nanarccisi paṁdaleyiṁ nivāḷiyaṁ puramathanaṁge koṭṭu maguḷduṁ paḍeva rpramatharka ḷadbhutaṁ .
svastiśrīmacchakanṛpavarṣada 1132 neya pramōda saṁvatsarada jyēṣṭhaśuddha tadige bṛhaspati
vāradaṁdu svasti samadhigata paṁcamahātabda vratajapaniyama hōmāgni yuktaruṁ śrīsvāmi
kārtikēyadēvatapōvanādhiparuṁ śrīmaddaṁḍāsana sukhāsīnarumappa . vinayanidhi
viṣṇukaradēvanu mayduṁvargamuṁ manōmudadiṁdaṁ tanatana geḷkōṭetapōdhanaru masaṁ khyāta bhakta
ruṁ baṇajigaruṁ . mahāsabheyāgi naredirddu . dānakrayaṁgaḷiṁdaṁ śrī nāgēśaṁge baṁda keymanegaḷana
tyānaṁdade barasida raṁbhōnidhi raviśaśigaḷuḷḷinaṁ śāsenadoḷ . śrī nāgēśvaradēvargge dēvaṁboladoḷ
vāmiyakkaṁ koṭṭa bhūmi savaṇbolada sīmeyiṁ paḍuval mattar 7 kaṁ 60 Adaṟa bhuje teṁka 120
ba 131 pa 13 mū 17 . daṭṭavoladoḷdēvarggāḍiyiṁ duḷḷa bhūmi kuṟugōḍa dāriyiṁ paḍuva
kāṭimageṟeyiṁ baḷiya bāviyiṁ vāyavyadoḷ maḷakaṁ 170 Adaṟa bhuje mū 14 pa 15
teṁkalu 5 ba 65 karuvanamāḷadoḷ vāsudēvaṁdēvargge koṭṭa bhūmi caṁgabbaya banniyiṁ
mūḍa jaṟigavolada dāriyiṁ teṁkal ma 11 kaṁ 67 Adaṟa bhuje ba 49 teṁ pa 58
māḷadoḷu dēyaṇa nāyakaṁ dēvargge koṭṭa bhūmi maṇamōcana
17 Ādara bhujepa 30 . mū 33 teṁ 19 ba 19 Eḷtinarāya
baḍagal bhagavati

div.head: On the reverse of the slab.
div.p:
manasaṁtōsaṁ vanasinoḷ suṁkaveggaḍe nāgarasaṁ dēvargge koṭṭa bhūmi seṭṭiya kaṟeya dāriyiṁ
mūḍalmattaraṁṭukaṁ mattara bhaje ba 29 teṁ 28 mū 70 pa 70 Ajja kāḍi voladoḷ huḷiyama
yyaṁ dēvargge koṭṭabhūmi sūryyadēvara keyyiṁ baḍagal 3 kaṁ 1 dara bhuje mo 19 pa 19 . ba 37 teṁ 3 7
Ālaṁboladoḷ bācayyana maga huṇisayyanaṁ dēvargge dhārege saṁda tōṁṭi Iṭṭageya dāriyiṁ
paḍuval traipuruṣadēvara tōṁṭadiṁ mattamātaniṁdhāregesaṁdatōṁṭa biḷukuṁṭeya dā
riya teṁka brahmacāri mukhyasthāna dayduvargaṁga ḷdēvara naṁdādīvigege biṭṭa gāṇa 1
Digital edition of SII 17.45 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
